BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-SamsungXR
BundleInfo.Author: Andre Michaelis
BundleInfo.Synopsis: 3D cursor, selection, and hover labels for all OpenXR autostereo displays
BundleInfo.Description: Adds 3D cursor, selection rectangle, and hover labels for OpenXR autostereo displays (Sony Spatial Reality, Acer SpatialLabs, Samsung Odyssey 3D). Press C to cycle cursor styles.
